objective: Continuously search for general, call-efficient Luna Light orchestration systems across exact sequence, planning, and logic problems.
retry_policy: Only infrastructure failures are retried. Valid, wrong, malformed, or protocol-violating model outputs are never selectively rerun.
sealing_policy: Each stage is registered before its calls. Sealed answers are first opened only after every worker call for the iteration is terminal. Completed panels are disposable and never reused for selection.
stop_policy: Finish the current durable call, then stop before the next iteration when STOP exists or SIGINT is received. Every completed stage is resumable.
